contributions.title: Pinch-Hit Heroes
contributions.subtitle: Hits by pinch hitters.

contributions.title: Pinch-Hit Chaos
contributions.subtitle: Pinch appearances ending in hit, HBP, HR, or K.

contributions.title: Pickoff Punching Bag
contributions.subtitle: Runners picked off.

contributions.title: TOOTBLAN Territory
contributions.subtitle: Caught stealing plus pickoffs.

contributions.title: LOB Stranded
contributions.subtitle: Total runners left on base.

contributions.title: Foul Ball Factory
contributions.subtitle: Total foul balls as the batting team.

contributions.title: Pitch Gluttons
contributions.subtitle: Total pitches seen by the offense this season.

contributions.title: BABIP
contributions.subtitle: Batting average on balls in play. Lower = fewer hits finding grass.

contributions.title: Ball Hawk Rate
contributions.subtitle: Share of pitches taken for balls.

contributions.title: Ball-in-Play Rate
contributions.subtitle: Plate appearances ending in contact (not K, BB, or HR).

contributions.title: Exit Velo Merchants
contributions.subtitle: Average exit velocity on batted balls.

contributions.title: First Pitch Attack Rate
contributions.subtitle: How often batters offer at the first pitch.

contributions.title: First Pitch Batting Average
contributions.subtitle: Batting average when putting the first pitch in play.

contributions.title: First Pitch Foul Rate
contributions.subtitle: Fouls on the first pitch.

contributions.title: First Pitch In-Play Rate
contributions.subtitle: How often the first pitch is put in play.

contributions.title: First Pitch Looking
contributions.subtitle: Called strikes taken on the first pitch.

contributions.title: First Pitch Slugging
contributions.subtitle: Slugging percentage when putting the first pitch in play.

contributions.title: First Pitch Strike Rate
contributions.subtitle: Share of first pitches that are strikes (called, swinging, foul, or in play).

contributions.title: First Pitch Whiff Rate
contributions.subtitle: Swinging strikes on the first pitch.

contributions.title: Foul Ball Rate
contributions.subtitle: Share of pitches fouled off.

contributions.title: Freeze Rate
contributions.subtitle: Called strikes per pitch seen.

contributions.title: Hard-Hit Merchants
contributions.subtitle: Batted balls at 95+ mph exit velocity.

contributions.title: How Was That Hit?
contributions.subtitle: Average Statcast contact grade (1 Weak → 6 Barrel).

contributions.title: Launch Angle Lounge
contributions.subtitle: Average launch angle on batted balls.

contributions.title: LOB%
contributions.subtitle: Share of baserunners left on base. Higher = more stranded traffic.

contributions.title: Pinch-Hit Success
contributions.subtitle: Pinch hits divided by pinch appearances.

contributions.title: Pitch Contact Rate
contributions.subtitle: Share of pitches put in play (not foul, ball, or whiff).

contributions.title: Pitches Per Hit
contributions.subtitle: How many pitches the offense sees per hit.

contributions.title: Pitches Per Plate Appearance
contributions.subtitle: How many pitches batters see before the PA ends.

contributions.title: Pitches Seen Per Half
contributions.subtitle: Average pitches the offense watches per half inning.

contributions.title: RISP Merchants
contributions.subtitle: Batting average with runners in scoring position.

contributions.title: Sweet Spot Society
contributions.subtitle: Batted balls launched between 8° and 32°.

contributions.title: Three True Outcomes Enjoyers
contributions.subtitle: Strikeouts, walks, and homers per plate appearance.

contributions.title: True Outcome Enjoyers
contributions.subtitle: Strikeout rate on plate appearances.

contributions.title: Whiff Per Pitch
contributions.subtitle: Swinging strikes per pitch seen.
